message: 🌱 Add istio: Support customization for Kubernetes Gateway API automated mission (#498)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-46594-support-customization-for-kubernetes-gateway-api-automated-deploymen",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Support customization for Kubernetes Gateway API automated deployments",
+    "description": "Support customization for Kubernetes Gateway API automated deployments. Requested by 21+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\n**Describe the feature request**\n\nI am looking for a way to configure `nodeSelector`, `tolerations` and `affinity` for automatic `Gateway` deployments in the multi-tenant Kubernetes cluster."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support customization for Kubernetes Gateway API automated",
+        "description": "This PR enhances custom `GatewayClass`'es and allows a per-class customization. Currently we have templates and service types hardcoded for each controller type instead.\n\n* Support `inject.istio.io/templates` annotation on `GatewayClass` to pick a custom template from the istiod ConfigMap.\n  * Uses\n```yaml\napiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1\r\nkind: GatewayClass\r\nmetadata:\r\n  name: istio-custom\r\n  annotations:\r\n    inject.istio.io/templates: custom\r\nspec:\r\n  controllerName: istio.io/gateway-controller\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support customization for Kubernetes Gateway API automated\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR enhances custom `GatewayClass`'es and allows a per-class customization. Currently we have templates and service types hardcoded for each controller type instead.\n\n* Support `inject.istio.io/templates` annotation on `GatewayClass` to pick a custom template from the istiod ConfigMap.\n  * Uses controller's default if unset.\n  * Supports just a single template for now.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1\r\nkind: GatewayClass\r\nmetadata:\r\n  name: istio-custom\r\n  annotations:\r\n    inject.istio.io/templates: custom\r\nspec:\r\n  controllerName: istio.io/gateway-controller",
+        "apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1\r\nkind: ProxyConfig\r\nmetadata:\r\n  name: my-gateway-affinity\r\nspec:\r\n  selector:\r\n    matchLabels:\r\n      istio.io/gateway-name: my-gateway\r\n  nodeSelector: {}\r\n  affinity: {}\r\n  tolerations: []",
+        "apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1\r\nkind: GatewayClass\r\nmetadata:\r\n  name: istio\r\nspec:\r\n  controllerName: istio.io/gateway-controller\r\n  description: The default Istio GatewayClass"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "istio",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "deploy"
+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/istio/istio/pull/46603"
+    },
+    "reactions": 21,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    ],

+  },
